name: Grayscale Sui Staking ETF
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Sui Staking ETF (formerly known as Grayscale Sui Trust (SUI)) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on April 30, 2024, by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act.
